j=12703638-82946 end end end end end end end end j=#g return K(P)end,function(m,r)local K=A(r)local F=function(F,s,g,V)return j(m,{F;s;g,V},r,K)end return F end,{},function(m,r)local K=A(r)local F=function(F,s,g)return j(m,{F,s,g},r,K)end return F end return(a(2262019-102606,{}))(K(P))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[r(-24371+17900)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
